name: 🎯 Specialist Lane
description: HANDOFF TARGET — Can be invoked either directly by the DAG scheduler or via HANDOFF from lane-handoff. Owns database architecture expertise. Always APPROVEs, providing the specialist knowledge the source lane needed.

checks.prompt: As the database specialist, provide the ORM and data layer decision for a TypeScript Node.js project: (1) recommended ORM (Prisma/Drizzle/TypeORM — pick one with justification), (2) migration toolchain, (3) connection pooling config, (4) 3 schema conventions to enforce. This may be responding to a HANDOFF request.
Generate a minimal Prisma schema.prisma example showing the conventions: datasource block, 2 model definitions with the required field patterns, and enum example. Context: {retryContext}
